test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=login_session, url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: When Submit Login Request
Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${data} = {'username': 'tomsmith', 'password': 'SuperSecretPassword!'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '49', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=username=tomsmith&password=SuperSecretPassword%21

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=login_session, url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: When Submit Login Request
Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${data} = {'username': 'tomsmith', 'password': 'WrongPassword123'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '43', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=username=tomsmith&password=WrongPassword123

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=login_session, url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: When Submit Login Request
Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${data} = {'username': 'invaliduser', 'password': 'SuperSecretPassword!'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '52', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=username=invaliduser&password=SuperSecretPassword%21
